Demo indexCatalog MDCatalog JSONRefero source
Public style references · local MD library

Design systems, indexed for report UI experiments.

Concise local references generated from public Refero style metadata. Existing curated Markdown files are preserved; missing styles get new local MD documents under refero-design-md/all/.
